overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban residential district beneath massive concrete overpasses. The player character moves from a shaded area under the highway through sunlit streets with digital billboards, eventually reaching a dense residential zone with overhead power lines and a burning trash pile.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath massive highway overpass

events.description: moving from deep shadow under overpass to sunlit intersection
turning left at intersection following the street curve

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the concrete overpass, then crossing the street and turning left at the intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past on the left side of the street

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with red structural beams dominating the sky
cluttered buildings and shacks constructed under the overpass
single palm tree casting long shadows on the sidewalk
steep asphalt ramp leading up to the overpass level
red street sign with white text reading Almunecar

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with red structural beams. The camera walks forward through dappled sunlight, passing a palm tree and makeshift buildings tucked under the bridge. At around 8 seconds, the scene opens to a sunlit intersection where the camera turns left, passing a red street sign reading 'Almunecar' while a silver sedan drives by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: large digital billboards become visible in the distance
passing from open street to area with buildings closer to sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street with billboards and the distant city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and dark pants crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: large rotating digital billboard displaying advertisements on a tall pillar
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: Having left the overpass behind, the camera walks along a wide sunlit street. Digital billboards rotate on tall pillars to the right, while the futuristic downtown skyline rises in the distance. The palm tree recedes to the left background as the camera passes pedestrians crossing the street and approaches buildings with graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense residential street with overhead power infrastructure

events.description: entering area with dense overhead power lines crisscrossing the street
rocky hillside becomes visible behind the residential structures

agents.ego_description: walking through a densely packed residential area with many overhead wires and makeshift structures built into the hillside

notable_agents.action: orange vintage-style car driving up the inclined street

entered.detail: dense network of electrical wires and cables crisscrossing above the street between poles
large red rocky cliff face rising behind the residential buildings
massive concrete wall with faded murals and graffiti
row of green metal garbage bins lined along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a densely packed residential area with a jungle of overhead power lines crisscrossing between wooden poles. A massive red rocky hillside rises behind the makeshift buildings. The camera walks past green dumpsters and shares the narrow street with an orange vintage car driving uphill. The downtown skyline disappears from view as the buildings close in.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with burning refuse and smoke

events.description: smoke and flames from burning trash pile become visible ahead
slowing down as approaching the burning trash pile

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a large burning trash pile in the middle of the street, slowing to a stop

notable_agents.action: character in tactical gear standing near the fire observing the flames

entered.detail: large pile of garbage bags engulfed in bright orange flames with thick black smoke rising
derelict cars parked along the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a chaotic scene where a large trash pile burns fiercely in the street, sending thick black smoke into the air. The camera slows as it nears the fire, passing abandoned vehicles and green dumpsters now visible on the left. A character in tactical gear stands near the flames, and the rocky hillside is obscured by smoke and buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded depths of a concrete highway overpass into a sunlit urban street that eventually narrows into a gritty, smoke-filled residential slum. It begins beneath massive concrete beams and red structural supports, moving through dappled sunlight and past makeshift buildings before opening into a bright intersection where the camera turns left past a red street sign. As the overpass recedes, the scene expands along a wide boulevard lined with rotating digital billboards and a distant futuristic skyline, passing pedestrians and graffiti-covered walls. The environment then shifts into a densely packed neighborhood where the skyline vanishes behind a jungle of overhead power lines and a towering red rocky hillside. Finally, the camera moves through a narrow street alongside an orange vintage car, approaching a chaotic scene where a large trash pile burns fiercely, sending thick black smoke into the air around a figure in tactical gear.
